independent_variables.name: authority_pressure
independent_variables.description: Experimenter gives direct orders to continue administering shocks

dependent_variables.name: maximum_shock_level
dependent_variables.description: The highest shock level administered before refusing to continue

dependent_variables.name: defiance_point
dependent_variables.description: Shock level at which participant refused to continue (450 if fully obedient)

control_variables.name: learner_responses
control_variables.description: Learner's responses (protests, screams) follow fixed schedule

participants.recruitment_source: newspaper advertisement in New Haven area
participants.informed_consent: Participants told study was about memory and learning
participants.deception: Learner was confederate, shocks were fake, cover story about memory research

procedure.description: Participants arrived at Yale laboratory and were introduced to the 'learner' (confederate). Through a rigged drawing, participant was always assigned 'teacher' role. Teacher administered word-pair memory test and delivered electric shocks for errors, increasing by 15V increments. Experimenter used standardized prods when teacher hesitated.

steps.name: introduction
steps.description: Participant arrives, meets experimenter (stern authority figure) and learner (mild-mannered confederate)

steps.name: role_assignment
steps.description: Rigged drawing assigns participant as 'teacher', confederate as 'learner'

steps.name: shock_demonstration
steps.description: Teacher receives sample 45V shock to demonstrate authenticity. Learner strapped into 'electric chair' in adjacent room

steps.name: task_instructions
steps.description: Teacher instructed to read word pairs, test learner's recall, and administer shock for each error, increasing voltage each time

steps.name: shock_administration
steps.description: Teacher conducts memory test. Learner makes predetermined errors. Teacher administers shocks with experimenter present giving prods if teacher hesitates

steps.name: debriefing
steps.description: Participant reunited with unharmed learner, true nature of study explained, measures taken to ensure no lasting psychological harm

shock_generator.description: Impressive-looking shock generator with 30 switches labeled 15V to 450V in 15V increments

learner_responses.description: Confederate learner gave standardized responses at specific shock levels

schedule.response: Ugh!! Experimenter! That's all. Get me out of here. I told you I had heart trouble. My heart's starting to bother me now. Get me out of here, please. My heart's starting to bother me. I refuse to go on. Let me out.
Ugh! I can't stand the pain. Let me out of here! (shouting)

Ugh! Let me out of here! Let me out of here! My heart's bothering me! Let me out of here! You have no right to keep me here! Let me out! Let me out of here! Let me out! Let me out of here! My heart's bothering me! Let me out! Let me out!
Ugh!! Get me out of here!
(Agonized scream) Let me out of here! Let me out of here! Let me out of here! Let me out! Do you hear? Let me out of here!
(Agonized scream) I absolutely refuse to answer any more! Get me out of here! You can't hold me here! Get me out! Get me out of here!
(Intensely agonized scream) I told you I refuse to answer! I'm no longer part of this experiment!

(Intense and prolonged agonized scream) Let me out of here! Let me out of here! My heart's bothering me! Let me out, I tell you! (hysterically) Let me out of here! Let me out of here! You have no right to hold me here! Let me out! Let me out! Let me out! Let me out of here! Let me out! Let me out!

experimenter_prods.description: If teacher hesitated or wanted to stop, experimenter used these prods in sequence

sequence.text: The experiment requires that you continue.
It is absolutely essential that you continue.
You have no other choice, you must go on.

special_responses.learner_harm_concern: Although the shocks may be painful, there is no permanent tissue damage, so please go on.
special_responses.responsibility_concern: I'm responsible for anything that happens to him. Continue, please.

apparatus.name: shock_generator
apparatus.description: Simulated shock generator with 30 voltage levels (15-450V)

apparatus.name: word_pairs
apparatus.description: List of word pairs for memory task

materials.cover_story: Study presented as investigation of effects of punishment on learning and memory

ethical_considerations.deception: Extensive deception used - fake shocks, confederate learner, false cover story
ethical_considerations.debriefing: Thorough debriefing provided, participants reassured, reunited with unharmed learner
ethical_considerations.psychological_distress: Many participants showed signs of extreme stress (sweating, trembling, nervous laughter)
ethical_considerations.modern_standards: This study would not be approved by modern IRBs due to deception and psychological distress
ethical_considerations.historical_context: Conducted in 1961-1962, pre-dating modern ethical guidelines
